intro.title: The Library
intro.lead: A reader for the full body of work — open any volume to read it here, with chapters, search, and read-aloud, or download the full text.

sections.heading: The Last Mind
sections.sub: A five-volume work on institutional capture, with the origin novel A Mind Is Born as its gateway.

sections.heading: The Fold
sections.sub: The Smithian Fold — a theory of everything from one axiom and one move. The full technical work, and three ways in for any reader.

sections.heading: ErnosDecent
sections.sub: The constructive counterpart — what to build instead.

sections.heading: The Seed Vault
sections.sub: The framework and narrative behind the survival archive — the full archive is on the Seed Vault page.

a-mind-is-born.title: A Mind Is Born
a-mind-is-born.sub: Book One — the origin novel. A childhood in 1990s Glasgow, reading as survival.

behind-the-mask.title: Behind the Mask
behind-the-mask.sub: Vol I · The Devil They Call God — the 400-year debt-money mechanism.

behind-the-performance.title: Behind the Performance
behind-the-performance.sub: Vol II · The Demon They Call the State — the political class as operating layer.

behind-the-blessed.title: Behind the Blessed
behind-the-blessed.sub: Vol III · The Demon They Call the Church — institutional capture of faith.

behind-the-knowing.title: Behind the Knowing
behind-the-knowing.sub: Vol IV · The Demon They Call Consensus — press, academia, the knowledge apparatus.

behind-the-synthesis.title: Behind the Synthesis
behind-the-synthesis.sub: Vol V · The Devil, the Demons & the Masks — the unifying framework.

smithian-fold.title: Smithian Fold: Theory of Everything
smithian-fold.sub: The full technical work — the constants of nature derived from one axiom and one move, with zero free parameters.

the-one-and-the-fold.title: The One and the Fold
the-one-and-the-fold.sub: The whole of physics from a single idea a child already understands — no mathematics required.

the-big-unfolding.title: The Big Unfolding
the-big-unfolding.sub: How one number became everything — a narrative walk through the fold.

the-unfolding-adventures.title: The Unfolding Adventures
the-unfolding-adventures.sub: An episodic story set in the Fold — fiction that teaches the theory, one night at a time.

ernosdecent-book.title: ErnosDecent: Owned by No One
ernosdecent-book.sub: The plain-language book — what to build instead, in everyday words.

hermeticism.title: Hermeticism, the Solo Initiate
hermeticism.sub: The bridge between the Hermetic tradition, the Smithian Fold, the tools, and the Seed Vault.

the-seed-book.title: The Seed Book
the-seed-book.sub: The narrative companion to the survival archive — why it exists and how to use it.
